headline: Why FedEx Is a Buy at These Levels With 84% One-Year Gains Behind It
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) is one of the few large industrials that has actually delivered on a turnaround narrative this year, and the chart shows it. After a nearly 84% one-year run, with the DRIVE program clearly working, the question now is whether shares can keep grinding higher into the FedEx Freight spin-off on June 1, 2026. ... Why FedEx Is a Buy at These Levels With 84% One-Year Gains Behind It

headline: Venti Technologies, Global Leader in AI-Powered Autonomous Vehicle Logistics Solutions, Wins 2026 FedEx Small Business Grant Contest in Asia Pacific
summary: SINGAPORE & BOSTON, April 27, 2026--Venti Technologies, a global leader in AI-powered autonomous vehicle (AV) logistics, emerged the winner of the 2026 FedEx Small Business Grant Contest at the Forbes Asia 100 to Watch Forum in Singapore on April 8th. Selected from four finalists drawn from the 2025 Forbes Asia 100 to Watch list, Venti stood out for its scalable innovation, strong commercial potential and ability to redefine logistics operations.

headline: What Makes FedEx Corporation (FDX) an Investment Choice?
summary: Victory Capital, overseeing the RS Large Cap Value Strategy, released its Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. It’s a value-focused strategy that seeks to invest in solid companies with attractive valuations. Given ongoing market volatility, risk management remains crucial. headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Portland, Oregon Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for Over 30 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Portland, OR to new owners, Rajesh and Radnee Kadam. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this PostalAnnex for more than 30 years. headline: FedEx's Q4 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: FedEx is expected to announce its fourth-quarter results in June, and analysts are projecting a single-digit fall in its EPS.
